creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
$ poudriere testport -j 122amd64 sysutils/rshim-user-space
[...]
====> Checking for pkg-plist issues (check-plist)
===> Parsing plist
===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
Error: Orphaned: etc/rshim.conf
Error: Orphaned: man/man8/bfb-install.8.gz
Error: Orphaned: sbin/bfb-install
===> Checking for items in pkg-plist which are not in STAGEDIR
===> Error: Plist issues found.

Note: use @comment to silence if any of these silence are false positives.
